query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "audio interaction model" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (d) and (f) as a foundational survey and canonical reference for the broader domain of extending LLMs to multimodal interactions (including audio), providing the necessary architectural context and research directions for a literature review on "Audio Interaction Model" extensions. While it does not focus exclusively on audio, it covers the "Multimodal Large Language Model" cluster which is the direct methodological framework for the user's proposed extension.
